desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.1: Performs up to four attacks forward, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.

desc.0: When Norma is the active character and is in combat, she gains 1.5% <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct> per second.
desc.1: When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct> is on her head, hold <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.2: After firing, Norma throws out <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct>, ordering it to unleash a round of aerial fire, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> and storing the current <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct>.
desc.3: When the skill hits an enemy, it triggers the previous character's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</ct>. This effect can trigger once every 5s.
desc.4: Once <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct> has been thrown out, it will accumulate and retain <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct> at the same speed on behalf of Norma. Norma does not need to stay on the field during this period.
desc.5: After Norma retrieves the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct>, she immediately gains the stored <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct>.
desc.6: When holding <IconNormal />, the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct> will accelerate toward Norma.
desc.7: If retrieving the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct> would raise <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct> to 80% or higher, the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct> will automatically accelerate toward Norma.
desc.8: When Norma switches from on field to off field while in combat, if <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct> is not full, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Top Hat Companion</ct> automatically enters the battlefield.
desc.9: Anti-Interrupt level is increased while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconEvade /> to activate:
desc.1: A quick dash dodge.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a dodge to activate:
desc.1: Spins while firing at nearby enemies, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Commands the Rumble Drill to continuously drill the target, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconSpecial /> to activate:
desc.1: Bombards enemies, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.

EXSpecialAttackEnNahBarrage.name: EX Special Attack: En-Nah Barrage

desc.0: With enough Energy, press <IconSpecialReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Operates the turret to fire continuously and launch different types of missiles based on the target's state:
desc.2: When the primary target is not Stunned, launches an Armor-Piercing Warhead, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> and inflicting a large amount of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Daze</ct>.
desc.3: When the primary target is Stunned, launches a High-Explosive Warhead, dealing greater <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.
desc.4: After using this skill, Norma gains 16% <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></ct> and enters the <ct color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</ct> state for 32s. While <ct color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</ct> is active, Norma deploys two <ct color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Turrets</ct> to join the battle.
desc.5: Continuing to hold extends the firing time by up to 2s, continuously consuming energy. For each 1 point of energy consumed while holding, Norma gains an additional 0.4% <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct>, and this round of <ct color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</ct> lasts 0.8s longer, up to a maximum additional duration of {CAL:2*20*0.8,1,2}s.
desc.6: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

params: Extended Shot Armor-Piercing Warhead Per Sec
Extended Shot High-Explosive Warhead Per Sec
Extended Shot Energy Cost Per Sec

SpecialAttackTargetPractice.name: Special Attack: Target Practice
SpecialAttackTargetPractice.desc: During battle, <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000010></ct> automatically attacks enemies, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.

desc.0: When any squad member Stuns an enemy, or when Norma consumes <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></ct> to trigger a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000010></ct> deploys its missile bay for 8s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
desc.1: During this time, <ct color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Turrets</ct> automatically attack more frequently. When performing automatic attacks, they launch different missiles based on the enemy's state:
desc.2: When the primary target is not Stunned, launch an Armor-Piercing Warhead, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> and inflicting a large amount of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Daze</ct>.
desc.3: When the primary target is Stunned, launch a High-Explosive Warhead, dealing greater <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.

desc.0: When a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> is triggered, select the character to activate:
desc.1: Commands a swarm of Rumble Drills to deal multiple hits, dealing massive <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When Decibel Rating is at <ct color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</ct>, press <IconUltimateReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Calls in tactical artillery to bombard enemies ahead, dealing massive <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When the active character is launched, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Commands the Rumble Drill to continuously attack the target, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
desc.2: This skill excels at parrying enemy attacks and reduces the consumption of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist Points</ct> when the character is under intense attacks.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> after a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Unleashes a series of attacks, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When initial CRIT Rate exceeds 50%, every additional 1% increases her CRIT DMG by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.86%</ct>, up to a maximum increase of <ct color=#2BAD00>43%</ct>.
desc.1: When initial CRIT Rate exceeds 50%, every additional 1% increases the Daze dealt by her <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</ct> by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.44%</ct> when they hit an enemy, up to a maximum increase of <ct color=#2BAD00>22%</ct>.
desc.2: Norma gains additional ATK based on her Sheer Force. Every 1 point of Sheer Force increases her ATK by 1.25, up to a maximum increase of 1,200 ATK.
desc.3: Upon entering the battlefield, Norma immediately gains 60% <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></ct>. In Investigation Zone Mode, this effect can trigger once every 180s.
desc.4: When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct> is at least 80%, the next <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Hat Trick</ct> can trigger a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</ct> regardless of cooldown, and consumes 80% <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct> to replace the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</ct> with a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct>.

desc.0: When initial CRIT Rate exceeds 50%, every additional 1% increases her CRIT DMG by <ct color=#2BAD00>1%</ct>, up to a maximum increase of <ct color=#2BAD00>50%</ct>.
desc.1: When initial CRIT Rate exceeds 50%, every additional 1% increases the Daze dealt by her <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</ct> by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.5%</ct> when they hit an enemy, up to a maximum increase of <ct color=#2BAD00>25%</ct>.
desc.2: Norma gains additional ATK based on her Sheer Force. Every 1 point of Sheer Force increases her ATK by 1.25, up to a maximum increase of 1,200 ATK.
desc.3: Upon entering the battlefield, Norma immediately gains 60% <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></ct>. In Investigation Zone Mode, this effect can trigger once every 180s.

desc.1: When initial CRIT Rate exceeds 50%, every additional 1% increases the Daze dealt by her <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</ct> by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.62%</ct> when they hit an enemy, up to a maximum increase of <ct color=#2BAD00>31%</ct>.

desc.3: Upon entering the battlefield, Norma immediately gains 60% <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000011></ct>. In Investigation Zone Mode, this effect can trigger once every 180s.

desc.0: When another character in your squad is an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Attack</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Rupture</ct> character, or shares the same Faction:
desc.1: When Norma, her creations, or Combat Bangboo hit an enemy, they apply 1 stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</ct>. Each stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</ct> increases the target's Stun DMG Multiplier by 3%, stacking up to 10 times. This effect can stack once every 0.5s.
desc.2: Enemies with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</ct> stacks have their Stun duration increased by 2s upon becoming Stunned. This Stun duration increase cannot stack with similar effects. When an enemy affected by <ct color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</ct> recovers from Stun, the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</ct> effect ends.
desc.3: While <ct color=#FFFFFF><Term:1000012></ct> is active, Norma's ATK increases by 44. This effect scales with character level, increasing by 14 per level, up to a maximum increase of 870.
desc.4: While <ct color=#FFFFFF>En-Nah Barrage</ct> is active, DMG dealt by all squad members increases by <ct color=#FFFFFF>20%</ct>.

1.name: Visionary Extremism
1.desc: The duration of the En-Nah Turret's missile bay deployed by <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Explosive Experiment</ct> increases to 12s. When an Armor-Piercing Warhead or High-Explosive Warhead from any skill hits an enemy, the target's All-Attribute RES is reduced by 15% for 15s.

flavor.1: Too many things are chasing us in this dying world: the pitch-black frontier, our fleeting lifespan.
flavor.2: Human life and civilization are more fragile than a Bangboo's logic core.
flavor.3: The only way to stay ahead of destruction is to keep moving forward, by any means necessary.
flavor.4: "Besides, the first to witness a new horizon always sees the most beautiful view, don't they?"

2.name: Axiom of Universal Unity
2.desc: The Stun DMG Multiplier granted by each stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Tech Divide</ct> in Norma's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability: Advantage in Numbers</ct> is increased to 6%. When Norma uses <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Hat Trick</ct> while in combat, she gains 25 Energy. This effect can trigger once every 20s.

flavor.0: The world of physicists is constantly overturned by new theories. The order ordinary people rely on is just as often shattered by unexpected events and conflict.
flavor.1: The ties that bind all things are always mysterious, both incredibly intimate and incredibly fragile, impossible to fully comprehend.
flavor.2: "Bring Bangboo and Roscaelifer to greater heights? You mean 'the byproduct of chasing curiosity,' right?"

3.name: Natural-Born Villain Paradox
3.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

flavor.0: It's another calm, peaceful day in Roscaelifer, with clear skies and a gentle breeze.
flavor.1: But for the Bangboo, there may still be one ultimate supervillain...
flavor.2: "Why is it that the smartest genius in every kids' cartoon always ends up becoming the bad guy...?"
flavor.3: "Seriously, what's so great about those crazy scientists whose budget and hairline are both hanging on by a thread?"

4.name: Bangboo Superiority Theory
4.desc: When Norma consumes <ct color=#FFFFFF>Preheated Chamber</ct> to trigger a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct>, both Norma and the corresponding Agent gain 200 Decibels.

flavor.0: Without a doubt, Bangboo are the most loyal companions humanity has had in the past century, the most efficient tools, and perhaps even... the most powerful weapons.
flavor.1: Like any child yet to be taught or any blade yet to find a worthy owner, a Bangboo can serve anyone, whether it's the righteous Phaethon or the most ruthless villain.
flavor.2: "First of all, I'm a pacifist who happens to love Bangboo."
flavor.3: "Second, part of my job is making sure the sharpest sword stays in our hands."

5.name: En-Nah Big Bang
5.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

flavor.0: According to archived External Strategy Department records, a project led by the young researcher Norma rapidly pushed the performance limits of mass-produced Bangboo to new heights.
flavor.1: Before being promoted to Chief Technician of the ESD, Norma's most important assignment was proving that she wouldn't one day launch Booastrum into orbit.
flavor.3: "The only things limiting imagination are courage and the R&D budget!"

6.name: The Primary Cause of Genius
6.desc: After any squad member Stuns an enemy, Norma will continuously summon missiles to bombard random enemies on the field for 6s. A missile is launched every 0.75s, dealing <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> equal to 200% of Norma's ATK to enemies within the area. This DMG is considered <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</ct> DMG. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once every 30s. The Daze inflicted by Armor-Piercing Warhead increases by <ct color=#FFFFFF>30%</ct>, and the DMG dealt by High-Explosive Warhead increases by <ct color=#FFFFFF>30%</ct>.
6.flavor: Every great creation begins with curiosity and a happy accident. Perhaps the birth of the very first Bangboo soul was nothing more than Lady Sunbringer's fascination with the mysteries of life.
